working_on.notes: Vite now correctly resolves and transpiles shared constants and rules via internal proxies. This fixed the build error related to importing from outside the src directory.

recent_changes.description: Vite Module Resolution fix via Proxy-based Alias Strategy
Finalized Command Center V2 and Branded PDF Exports

errors_encountered.error: Vite error: Cannot import file outside of root src
errors_encountered.solution: Created proxy files in src/shared that re-export from root shared/

decisions_made.reason: Avoids complex Vite/Rollup config while keeping a single source of truth for shared logic.
